pinpoint.inapptemplate.overridebuttoncon.Description: The action that occurs when a recipient chooses a button in an in-app message. You can specify one of the following:  + `LINK` – A link to a web destination.+ `DEEP_LINK` – A link to a specific page in an application.+ `CLOSE` – Dismisses the message.
The destination (such as a URL) for a button.
